headline: How Strong 2025 Results and Higher Payouts Will Impact Williams-Sonoma (WSM) Investors
summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. has reported past fourth-quarter 2025 results showing sales of US$2,357.13 million and net income of US$368.02 million, alongside full-year 2025 sales of US$7,806.82 million and net income of US$1,088.44 million, while also raising its quarterly dividend by 15% to US$0.76 per share and completing a US$661.47 million share repurchase program. Beyond the headline figures, Williams-Sonoma paired earnings that exceeded profit expectations with upbeat 2026 revenue and margin...

headline: RBC Capital Raises Williams-Sonoma (WSM) Target After Q4 Beat; TD Cowen Stays Positive
summary: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE:WSM) is included among the 15 Dividend Stocks to Buy for Steady Income. On March 19, RBC Capital raised its price recommendation on Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (NYSE:WSM) to $214 from $206. It reiterated an Outperform rating after the company reported a Q4 earnings beat. The analyst pointed to steady market share gains and solid […]
